pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 features, failing to leverage or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the javax.servlet-api dependency with jakarta.servlet-api to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using the old artifact causes compile errors due to missing classes or namespace conflicts in Spring Boot 3.x.
